title: viola × blaxlandiae
intro: Viola × blaxlandiae, also known as the hybrid pansy or Blaxland's pansy, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Viola odorata and Viola banksii, which are both members of the violet family. The medicinal properties of Viola × blaxlandiae include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Viola × blaxlandiae include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia and other sleep disorders. Herbal preparations of Viola × blaxlandiae can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
